title: The Last Of Us
description: The best story ever.

title: Red Dead Redemption
description: Has a very good story.

title: A Way Out
description: Great finale!

title: Horizon Zero Dawn Complete Edition
description: Liked the AI philosophy in this game.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man
description: Loved the huge and realistic map.

title: UNCHARTED The Nathan Drake Collection
description: Good story.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: Great story, map and details.

title: Journey
description: A unique experience. Liked the solo journey.

title: The Last Of Us Remastered
description: The best story ever.

title: Death Stranding
description: Very creative story, world and play style.

title: The Last of Us Part II
description: Better story than the first game. The ending was amazing. It left me conflicted about my own thoughts and decisions.

title: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Excellent game. Played it three times and used save files to see every ending. The story is fantastic, and its take on capitalism is one of the strongest parts of the game.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales
description: Same as the first game in the series, I liked the map, story, and attention to detail. The only downside is that it felt too short.

title: Astro's Playroom
description: Shows off DualSense features, and gives a quick Playstation history recap. Creative but not an amazing game.

title: Uncharted 4: A Thief's End
description: Great story. Loved seeing Drake and his brother Sam's past.

title: Until Dawn
description: Good horror game. It wasn't that scary but I loved how the choices affected the story.

title: Resident Evil 7: Biohazard
description: Amazing game. Loved the graphics, the story and the game play. Scariest game I played.

title: Days Gone
description: Great open world action game. Good story too.

title: Ratchet & Clank
description: Not my type.

title: Call of Cthulhu
description: Good story. First Lovecraftian game I ever played and I liked it.

title: Atomic Heart
description: I agree with the popular thought on this game being very similar to BioShock with its gameplay. I liked the world though.

title: Mass Effect: Legendary Edition
description:
Excellent game. The game makes the player bond with the characters well. Has a great ending as well, answers all the questions.

“Stand in the ashes of a trillion dead souls, and ask the ghosts if honor matters. The silence is your answer.” - Jarvik

“Had to be me. Someone else might’ve gotten it wrong.” - Mordin Solus

title: Stray
description: Loved it. Amazing to play as a cat. Excellent!

title: The Lord of the Rings: Gollum
description: Too bad such a good concept and game was wasted by poor execution. I would have loved to play stealth in the Middle Earth.

title: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: Amazing game. The beginning is a bit slow, but it becomes excellent. A vast world, strong characters, and a beautiful, emotional story.

title: Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons
description: Another beautiful, emotional game. Unfortunately, it was too short.

title: Detroit: Become Human
description: Great game. I loved the story and how choices mattered. It made me think a lot about AI and robotics.

title: The Last of Us Part I
The Callisto Protocol
description: Loved it's jump scares. Great graphics, map, level design, and gameplay.

title: Control
description: Loved the puzzles but not a fan of the game overall.

title: Enter the Gungeon
description: Not my type or I didn't give it enough chance.

title: Returnal
description: Loved it! A must play!

title: Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart
description: Not my type.

title: Mortal Kombat X
description: Not a fan of learning combos.

title: Rogue Company
description: It was difficult to play a competitive FPS on console.

title: Shadow of the Colossus (2011)
description: Unique experience, story and gameplay. Deserves a remake for sure.

title: Thumper
description: Not bad but I didn't find myself keep coming back to it. Maybe a better sounds system or a headset might make the experience better.

title: Gran Turismo Sport
description: Not that bad but maybe racing games aren't for me.

title: Bloodborne
description: A masterpiece. First souls game I played and loved it. Deserves a remake.

title: The Order: 1886
description: Alright.

title: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
description: Good game. Loved the graphics and the story.

title: Evil West
description: Repetitive game play. Graphics and the sound were good.

title: EA SPORTS FIFA 23
description: It's the same FIFA game. I hate that they release the same game every year but just update the teams and add a few little features. I'd prefer one game but one that gets team updates every year.

title: Banishers: Ghosts of New Eden
description: Alright. Repetitive game play. Interesting story but didn't captivate me.

title: God of War (2018)
description: Great game. Amazing story and graphics.

title: God of War: Ragnarök
description: Another great God of War game. Loved the story.

title: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
description: Alright.

title: The Quarry
description: From the same developers as Until Dawn. Good horror game. Love how the choices matter.

title: Warframe
description: Fast paced game. Not bad. Didn't like the limited inventory.

title: A Plague Tale: Innocence
description: Loved it. Has a great story and game play.

title: Resident Evil: Village
description: Another great Resident Evil game. Wish it was as scary as the one before Biohazard.

title: Alan Wake Remastered
description: Good game but it requires full attention to follow the story and at times it has slow pace. Loved the soundtrack though.

title: Dead Space
description: Great atmosphere, graphics, story and gameplay. Not that scary for a horror game but the combat was satisfying. Solid overall.

title: Assassin's Creed Mirage
description: Loved it. It's nice to walk in the streets of old Baghdad. It had been a while since I played an Assassin's Creed game.

title: TEKKEN 7
description: Not a fan of learning combos.

title: The Last of Us Part II Remastered
description: Not a fan of learning combos.

title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
description: As great as the first game. Great atmosphere, flying around in that huge map feels good. Good story too.

title: Outer Wilds
description: Great game. An open world puzzle. No complaints about how they used quantum physics throughout the game. Nice stretch of physics, no huge nonsense.

title: Resident Evil 4
description: Another great Resident Evil game.

title: Need for Speed Heat
description: Alright. Good for relieving stress by speeding up.

title: Uncharted: The Lost Legacy
description: Good game.

title: Horizon Forbidden West
description: Good production but the story didn't captivate me as much as the first game.

title: The Witcher 3 Wild Hunt - Complete Edition
description: Excellent game. Vast map, great story and characters. Loved the moral dilemmas. The mini game Gwent was very fun also.

title: Lords of the Fallen
description: Not bad but I think I'll wait to find a duo for this one.

title: Stardew Valley
description: Not my type.

title: Crash Bandicoot N. Sane Trilogy
description: Couldn't get into it.

title: Diablo IV
description: Great art design, graphics, sounds, cinematics, vast world, good story. At the end it felt like more farming for items.

title: Alan Wake 2
description: Great production overall with graphics, level design and soundtracks. Creative and surreal story but requires too much attention to follow. Shooting was satisfactory.

title: Subnautica
description: Creative story and gameplay however farming materials was boring.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare (2019)
description: Great story. Excellent FPS with unique tools and good gameplay. Classic Call of Duty quality.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II
description: Similar to previous title, great game. Loved the plot twist.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III
description: Similar to previous titles, great game. Great story with an emotional ending. Left me looking forward to the next game. Loved the stealth missions in this game.

title: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
description: Nice combat mechanics and good story.

title: Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition
description: Nice combat mechanics and good story.

title: Batman: Arkham Origins
description: Nice combat mechanics and good story.

title: Batman: Arkham Knight
description: Nice combat mechanics and good story.

title: BioShock Remastered
description: Creative gameplay and good story.

title: BioShock 2 Remastered
description: Creative gameplay and good story.

title: Dishonored
description: Loved the stealth gameplay on this one.

title: Dying Light
description: Excellent game with good story and combat mechanics. Super fun when played co-op.

title: The Forest
description: Super fun with friends. Can get scary sometimes. Crafting and farming materials wasn't boring or complicated.
